label: ball
groundingNote: a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; it is not like other things: all its sides are the same; when someone does something to it with the {urn:molecule-v0:hand|hand} [m], it can move on the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m] for some time; {urn:molecule-v0:child|children} [m] do things with it at many times because it feels good
notes: Toy-artifact kind; roundness approximated as 'all its sides are the same' (shape molecules unminted).
